strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple roles and projects
Strong background in scalable architectures, databases (PostgreSQL, MongoDB), and cloud services (AWS CDK)
Demonstrated expertise in clean software architecture, testing (TDD, CI/CD), and team collaboration
concerns: Current role as Staff Engineer may suggest overqualification for a junior/mid-level position
Limited direct experience with PostgreSQL in recent roles (previously worked with MongoDB)
No clear evidence of work with machine learning, OCR, or document verification (nice-to-have qualifications)
response.justification: Bogdan exhibits strong fullstack development skills with TypeScript, React, and Node.js, and has experience with scalable architectures and cloud services. However, his current senior role and limited recent PostgreSQL exposure may not align perfectly with the junior/mid-level position's requirements, though his adaptability and expertise could still add value to the team.
